subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend and eternal beloved! Though outwardly we have not met for some time, yet thou art ever present with me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین و حبیب قدیم هر چند مدتیست که بظاهر ملاقاتی نشده ولی همیشه نزد منی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
